ddls:
CREATE TABLE "leagues" (
  "league_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each league */,
  "league_name" TEXT /* Name of the league */,
  "country" TEXT /* Country where the league is based */,
  "founded_year" INTEGER /* Year the league was founded */,
  "number_of_teams" INTEGER /* Total number of teams in the league */,
  "current_season" TEXT /* Current season (e.g., 2022-2023) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("league_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "divisions" (
  "division_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each division */,
  "league_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the league the division belongs to */,
  "division_name" TEXT /* Name of the division */,
  "number_of_teams" INTEGER /* Total number of teams in the division */,
  "promotion_rules" TEXT /* Rules for promotion to higher divisions */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("division_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_divisions_league_id FOREIGN KEY ("league_id") REFERENCES leagues ("league_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "conferences" (
  "conference_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each conference */,
  "division_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the division the conference belongs to */,
  "conference_name" TEXT /* Name of the conference */,
  "number_of_teams" INTEGER /* Total number of teams in the conference */,
  "promotion_rules" TEXT /* Rules for promotion to higher conferences */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("conference_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_conferences_division_id FOREIGN KEY ("division_id") REFERENCES divisions ("division_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "teams" (
  "team_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each team */,
  "conference_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the conference the team belongs to */,
  "team_name" TEXT /* Name of the team */,
  "stadium" TEXT /* Name of the team's stadium */,
  "founded_year" INTEGER /* Year the team was founded */,
  "manager_name" TEXT /* Name of the current team manager */,
  "logo_url" TEXT /* URL of the team's logo */,
  "website" TEXT /* URL of the team's official website */,
  "social_media" TEXT /* URLs of the team's social media profiles */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("team_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_teams_conference_id FOREIGN KEY ("conference_id") REFERENCES conferences ("conference_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "players" (
  "player_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each player */,
  "team_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the team the player belongs to */,
  "player_name" TEXT /* Name of the player */,
  "position" TEXT /* Position of the player (e.g., goalkeeper, defender, midfielder, forward) */,
  "date_of_birth" TEXT /* Date of birth of the player */,
  "nationality" TEXT /* Nationality of the player */,
  "height" REAL /* Height of the player */,
  "weight" REAL /* Weight of the player */,
  "preferred_foot" TEXT /* Preferred foot (left or right) */,
  "contract_expiry_date" TEXT /* Date the player's contract expires */,
  "market_value" REAL /* Current market value of the player */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("player_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_players_team_id FOREIGN KEY ("team_id") REFERENCES teams ("team_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "matches" (
  "match_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each match */,
  "league_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the league the match belongs to */,
  "home_team_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the home team */,
  "away_team_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the away team */,
  "match_date" TEXT /* Date of the match */,
  "home_goals" INTEGER /* Number of goals scored by the home team */,
  "away_goals" INTEGER /* Number of goals scored by the away team */,
  "stadium" TEXT /* Name of the stadium where the match is played */,
  "attendance" INTEGER /* Number of spectators in attendance */,
  "referee" TEXT /* Name of the referee */,
  "match_status" TEXT /* Status of the match (e.g., completed, postponed, abandoned) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("match_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_matches_league_id FOREIGN KEY ("league_id") REFERENCES leagues ("league_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_matches_home_team_id FOREIGN KEY ("home_team_id") REFERENCES teams ("team_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_matches_away_team_id FOREIGN KEY ("away_team_id") REFERENCES teams ("team_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "standings" (
  "standing_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each standing */,
  "league_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the league the standing belongs to */,
  "team_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the team */,
  "position" INTEGER /* Position of the team in the league */,
  "played" INTEGER /* Number of matches played by the team */,
  "wins" INTEGER /* Number of wins by the team */,
  "draws" INTEGER /* Number of draws by the team */,
  "losses" INTEGER /* Number of losses by the team */,
  "goals_for" INTEGER /* Number of goals scored by the team */,
  "goals_against" INTEGER /* Number of goals conceded by the team */,
  "goal_difference" INTEGER /* Goal difference of the team */,
  "points" INTEGER /* Number of points earned by the team */,
  "goals_scored_per_game" REAL /* Average goals scored per game */,
  "goals_conceded_per_game" REAL /* Average goals conceded per game */,
  "clean_sheets" INTEGER /* Number of clean sheets kept */,
  "shots_on_target" INTEGER /* Total shots on target */,
  "possession_percentage" REAL /* Average possession percentage */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("standing_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_standings_league_id FOREIGN KEY ("league_id") REFERENCES leagues ("league_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_standings_team_id FOREIGN KEY ("team_id") REFERENCES teams ("team_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "player_statistics" (
  "stat_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each statistic */,
  "player_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the player */,
  "goals_scored" INTEGER /* Number of goals scored by the player */,
  "assists" INTEGER /* Number of assists by the player */,
  "yellow_cards" INTEGER /* Number of yellow cards received by the player */,
  "red_cards" INTEGER /* Number of red cards received by the player */,
  "minutes_played" INTEGER /* Total minutes played by the player */,
  "starts" INTEGER /* Number of matches started by the player */,
  "substitutes" INTEGER /* Number of times the player was substituted */,
  "shots_on_target" INTEGER /* Total shots on target */,
  "pass_accuracy" REAL /* Pass accuracy percentage */,
  "tackles" INTEGER /* Total tackles made */,
  "interceptions" INTEGER /* Total interceptions made */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("stat_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_player_statistics_player_id FOREIGN KEY ("player_id") REFERENCES players ("player_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "team_statistics" (
  "stat_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each statistic */,
  "team_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the team */,
  "goals_scored" INTEGER /* Number of goals scored by the team */,
  "goals_conceded" INTEGER /* Number of goals conceded by the team */,
  "clean_sheets" INTEGER /* Number of clean sheets kept by the team */,
  "shots_on_target" INTEGER /* Total shots on target */,
  "pass_accuracy" REAL /* Pass accuracy percentage */,
  "possession_percentage" REAL /* Average possession percentage */,
  "fouls_committed" INTEGER /* Total fouls committed */,
  "fouls_suffered" INTEGER /* Total fouls suffered */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("stat_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_team_statistics_team_id FOREIGN KEY ("team_id") REFERENCES teams ("team_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "injuries" (
  "injury_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each injury */,
  "player_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the player */,
  "injury_type" TEXT /* Type of injury */,
  "injury_date" TEXT /* Date the injury occurred */,
  "return_date" TEXT /* Expected return date */,
  "injury_severity" TEXT /* Severity of the injury (e.g., minor, moderate, severe) */,
  "rehabilitation_status" TEXT /* Current status of rehabilitation (e.g., in progress, completed) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("injury_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_injuries_player_id FOREIGN KEY ("player_id") REFERENCES players ("player_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "transfers" (
  "transfer_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each transfer */,
  "player_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the player */,
  "from_team_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the team the player transferred from */,
  "to_team_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the team the player transferred to */,
  "transfer_date" TEXT /* Date of the transfer */,
  "transfer_fee" REAL /* Transfer fee paid */,
  "transfer_type" TEXT /* Type of transfer (e.g., permanent, loan) */,
  "loan_end_date" TEXT /* End date of a loan transfer */,
  "loan_fee" REAL /* Fee paid for a loan transfer */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("transfer_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_transfers_to_team_id FOREIGN KEY ("to_team_id") REFERENCES teams ("team_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_transfers_from_team_id FOREIGN KEY ("from_team_id") REFERENCES teams ("team_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_transfers_player_id FOREIGN KEY ("player_id") REFERENCES players ("player_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "username" TEXT /* Username of the user */,
  "password" TEXT /* Password of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., administrator, team manager, analyst) */,
  "first_name" TEXT /* First name of the user */,
  "last_name" TEXT /* Last name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "phone_number" TEXT /* Phone number of the user */,
  "last_login" TEXT /* Date and time of the last login */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "access_logs" (
  "access_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each access event */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the user */,
  "access_date" TEXT /* Date and time of access */,
  "access_type" TEXT /* Type of access (e.g., view, update) */,
  "ip_address" TEXT /* IP address of the user accessing the system */,
  "user_agent" TEXT /* User agent string of the device used */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("access_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)
